reviewed_scope: Focused final-blocker re-review after the full-project final review identified three release blockers.

plan_alignment.notes: The staged changes align with Step 10 checklist item 12 and the final review blockers: licensing metadata is corrected, contribution licensing is aligned, and Docker sample-data defaults no longer mask configured MQTT.

correctness_safety.notes: Blank sample-data configuration in Compose and .env.example allows getMapRuntimeConfig defaults to select sample data only when MQTT is not configured; explicit true remains available for demo mode.

code_quality.notes: The changes are small, direct, and maintain existing file patterns without adding unnecessary complexity.

completeness.notes: All three final blockers under review are addressed in the staged files, and the reported lint, typecheck, build, Docker build, Compose config, and grep validations cover the relevant release paths.

patterns.notes: The Docker/runtime examples now defer to the existing server-side runtime config contract, and documentation is consistent with the GPL-3.0-or-later compliance model.

integration.notes: Compose environment interpolation now integrates correctly with the MQTT runtime path, preserving blank/unset defaults and not overriding configured MQTT with sample data.

release_readiness.notes: The prior release-blocking license and Docker/MQTT inconsistencies are resolved for this review scope.
